clientName: Hong Kong Tsz Kwong Bethel Church 香港伯特利教會慈光堂
title: 60th Anniversary: Digital Transformation & Brand Revitalization 60周年數碼轉型與品牌重塑

background.en: The church was approaching its 60th anniversary with a website that had not been significantly updated in nearly 20 years. The pandemic had shifted most of their congregation online, so they needed a site that worked for both in-person and remote attendees.
background.zh: 慈光堂60周年堂慶前夕，原有網站已近20年未大幅更新。疫情後會眾習慣轉為線上參與，教會需要一個能同時服務實體與線上群體的網站。

solution.en: We rebuilt the website on WordPress and synced it with the church's mobile app, so congregants receive real-time updates across both platforms. We also produced a 3-minute video tracing the church's missionary history, using archival research and location shoots to tell the story of how the church has sent people out over the decades.
solution.zh: 以 WordPress 重建官方網站，並與教會手機應用程式同步，讓會眾即時接收最新資訊。團隊同時翻查歷史資料、實地拍攝，製作了一條3分鐘的敘事影片，記錄教會六十年來的宣教足跡。

clientName: Hong Kong Tsz Kwong Bethel Church 香港伯特利教會慈光堂
title: Livestrem Production for Online Gathering and Church Anniversary Visual 網上聚會直播及堂慶直播視覺企劃

background.en: Pandemic restrictions forced the church to move its services online. They needed help making the transition feel intentional rather than makeshift.
background.zh: 疫情限制下，教會需將聚會移至網上直播。工作室與教會團隊合作，確保過渡期間的聚會體驗不中斷。

solution.en: For the 60th anniversary livestream, we asked congregants to handwrite individual characters of the church's slogan. We digitized each one and pieced them together into a collective standby screen, turning what is usually a placeholder into something the whole community contributed to.
solution.zh: 60周年堂慶直播前，我們邀請會眾各自手寫教會標語的一個字，再將所有字跡數位化、重新拼合，成為直播等待畫面。原本只是一個技術環節，變成了全體會眾的共同創作。

clientName: Tsz Kwong Community Service Link 慈光社群服務網絡
title: Expanding Horizon: Brand-New Website & Brand Digital Transformation 擴展服務範圍：全新網站與品牌數位轉型

background.en: The organization runs community services across multiple age groups. As they expanded from Kowloon City into other districts, their old setup (a page on the parent church's website) made it hard for people to find the help they needed.
background.zh: 機構的社區服務遍及不同年齡層，近年由九龍城擴展至多區。但一直依附母會網站，沒有獨立平台，求助者往往找不到所需資訊。

solution.en: We built a standalone WordPress site that staff can update without technical help. The navigation organizes services by category and lists each district center's contact details. We pulled images from the organization's photo archive and matched the site colors to their existing logo, so the whole thing feels like one brand.
solution.zh: 以 WordPress 建立獨立網站，行政人員可自行更新內容。導航按服務類別分類，並列出各區中心的地址與聯絡方式。設計方面從機構相片庫選取真實影像，網站色調配合原有標誌，整體形象一致。

clientName: 西北祈禱院 North West House of Prayer
title: 聲音導賞與敘事設計 Audio Guide & Narrative Design

background.en: The prayer house had good material but not enough staff to give every visitor a guided tour, especially in multiple languages.
background.zh: 西北祈禱院內容豐富，但人手不足以提供多語言導賞，影響參觀體驗。

solution.en: We turned their existing content into a trilingual audio guide (Cantonese, English, Mandarin) using AI voice processing and audio engineering. Visitors can now go through the space at their own pace.
solution.zh: 將現有內容轉化為粵、英、普三語聲音導賞，透過 AI 語音技術與音效製作，讓參觀者可按自己的節奏收聽講解。

clientName: 國度禾場事工有限公司 Kingdom Harvest Ministries Ltd.
title: 聖地遊禱系列 Holy Land Tour & Prayer Series

background.en: The channel wanted travel and prayer content that would connect with viewers.
background.zh: 頻道需要旅遊祈禱相關內容，以吸引並觸動觀眾。

solution.en: We produced the Holy Land Tour and Prayer Series, handling the full production pipeline including color grading and editing to give each episode a consistent look and feel.
solution.zh: 全盤製作《聖地遊禱系列》，從調色到剪接統一風格，讓每集保持一致的視覺質感。

title: From Hundreds to 100K+ Views: YouTube Content Strategy & Channel Growth 觀看量破十萬的逆襲：YouTube 內容策略、頻道經營與直播製作

background.en: The running club had top-tier coaching but almost no online presence. Their early YouTube videos suffered from muddy audio, inconsistent visuals, and unfocused topics, with most struggling to reach even a few hundred views.
background.zh: 跑會雖有頂尖教練，數位知名度卻幾乎空白。早期 YouTube 影片主題鬆散、收音與畫面質素參差，每條影片觀看量長期停留數百次。

solution.en: From 2021 to 2024, we ran the channel end to end: planning, filming, writing, and designing thumbnails. We tightened the editing, added B-roll and on-screen graphics, and made the head coach the channel's technical voice. One gear guide comparing 18 HOKA shoes crossed 100K views. Later we added multi-camera livestream interviews with pro runners.
solution.zh: 2021至2024年間，工作室全面營運頻道：內容企劃、拍攝、撰稿、縮圖設計一手包辦。剪接上加快節奏、加入B-roll與圖像輔助，將總教練定位為技術權威。一條18對HOKA跑鞋評測影片突破10萬觀看，後期更升級至多機直播訪問專業跑手。

title: Trailblazing Identity: Bespoke Performance Apparel & Event Activation 傳承跑會精神：專屬跑衣設計與賽事行銷
tags: 社群媒體營運 Social Media Operations

background.en: Crazy Running Club (CRC) wanted to look and feel like a serious trail running community during race season. They needed custom apparel for visibility on the trails and someone to handle social media during the big events.
background.zh: 豐山跑（CRC）希望在賽季中以專業越野跑社群的形象示人，需要專屬跑衣提升賽道辨識度，以及賽事期間的社交媒體營運。

solution.en: We kept the club's existing colors and designed two singlet styles, working with a manufacturer to get the breathability right for long trail runs. The Lion Rock silhouette runs across the chest with the club slogan underneath. Runners wore them during Oxfam Trailwalker, and visibility on the course was night and day. During HK4TUC, we ran CRC's Instagram with live tracking of the coach and runners, turning race data into posts the local running community actually followed.
solution.zh: 保留跑會原有配色，設計了兩款跑步背心，與廠商合作確保透氣快乾適合長途越野。「獅子山」線條橫跨胸前，配上跑會口號。選手在毅行者中穿著出戰，賽道辨識度大幅提升。HK4TUC 期間全程營運跑會 Instagram，實時追蹤教練與選手位置，將賽事數據轉化為跑界關注的內容。
